animals.name: Deshi Shahi Cow
animals.description: This healthy and strong local Deshi Shahi cow has been raised entirely on natural feed with no diseases. It has shiny skin, excellent meat quality, and is ideal for Qurbani. Calm temperament makes it safe and suitable for family sacrifice.

animals.name: Red Chittagong Cow
animals.description: Pure Red Chittagong bull with powerful body structure and superior meat quality. Its distinctive red color and strong build make it one of the most demanded breeds for Qurbani in Bangladesh.

animals.name: Sahiwal Cow
animals.description: High quality Sahiwal cow with calm temperament and excellent dairy traits. Well-balanced meat and fat ratio makes it suitable for both Qurbani and milk production.

animals.name: Black Bengal Goat
animals.description: Pure Black Bengal goat famous for its delicious and tender meat. Highly demanded during Eid ul Adha across Bangladesh.

animals.name: Jamunapari Goat
animals.description: Large sized Jamunapari goat with impressive long ears and strong body structure. Attractive appearance and higher meat yield.

animals.name: Beetal Goat
animals.description: Strong and muscular Beetal breed goat with good body weight and superior meat quality.

animals.name: Deshi Khasi
animals.description: Well-fattened Deshi Khasi (castrated male goat) ideal for Qurbani. Excellent meat quality with tender texture.

animals.name: Large Khasi
animals.description: Heavy and healthy large Deshi Khasi with superior meat quality and high body weight. Perfect for family Qurbani.

animals.name: Dumba Sheep
animals.description: Healthy Dumba sheep with prominent fat tail, highly valued for its unique meat flavor and Qurbani.

animals.name: Deshi Camel
animals.description: Strong and healthy local Deshi camel. Robust build with excellent stamina.

animals.name: Premium Camel
animals.description: Premium quality Deshi camel with outstanding stamina and high body weight. Perfect for grand Qurbani events.

animals.name: Holstein Friesian Cow
animals.description: High milk yielding Holstein Friesian cow with large body frame. Excellent for dairy farming and also suitable for Qurbani.

animals.name: Sindhi Cow
animals.description: Pure Sindhi breed cow known for excellent heat tolerance and good milk production.

animals.name: Premium Khasi
animals.description: Very well-fattened premium Deshi Khasi with high body weight and superior meat quality.
